lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਲਗੁ ਜੀਉ ਪਰਾਣ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jau lag jeeo paraan sach dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: As long as there is the breath of life, meditate on the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa har gun gaae milai sukh paaeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You shall receive the profit of singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and find peace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਤੇਰੀ ਕਾਰ ਦੇਹਿ ਦਇਆਲ ਤੂੰ ॥
lines.translit: sachee teree kaar dehi deaal toon |
lines.english: True is Your Service; bless me with it, O Merciful Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਜੀਵਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ਮੈ ਟੇਕ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਤੂੰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hau jeevaa tudh saalaeh mai ttek adhaar toon |2|
lines.english: I live by praising You; You are my Anchor and Support. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਹੈਰਾਨੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਗਵਾਵਹੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhagat teree hairaan darad gavaavahee |3|
lines.english: How wonderful is Your devotional worship! It removes all pains. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਦਰਵਾਨੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਤੂੰ ਜਾਣਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: dar sevak daravaan darad toon jaanahee |
lines.english: I am Your servant, the gate-keeper at Your Gate; You alone know my pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਗਹ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਦੂਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਣਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: daragah naam hadoor guramukh jaanasee |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs know that by chanting the Naam, they shall dwell in His Court, in His Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਕਰਿ ਭਾਉ ਤੋਸਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: sat santokh kar bhaau tosaa har naam see |
lines.english: Those who practice Truth, contentment and love, obtain the supplies of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਲਾ ਸਚੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣਸੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: velaa sach paravaan sabad pachhaanasee |4|
lines.english: True and acceptable is that time, when one recognizes the Word of the Shabad. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸਚਾ ਨੇਹੁ ਸਚੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sache sachaa nehu sachai laaeaa |
lines.english: The True Lord inspires true love in the truthful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਦੇਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: manahu chhodd vikaar sachaa sach dee |5|
lines.english: So banish corruption from your mind, and the True One will grant you Truth. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਆਉ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aape kare niaau jo tis bhaaeaa |6|
lines.english: He Himself administers justice, as it pleases His Will. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲੁ ਹੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tis sevee din raat naam amol hai |7|
lines.english: Day and night, I serve the One whose Name is priceless. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸਚੀ ਦਾਤਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: sache sachee daat dehi deaal hai |
lines.english: True is the gift of the True, Compassionate Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਉਤਮੁ ਹਉ ਨੀਚੁ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਕਾਂਢੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: toon utam hau neech sevak kaandteea |
lines.english: You are so sublime, and I am so lowly, but I am called Your slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਹੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਚੁ ਵਾਂਢੀਆ ॥੮॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: naanak nadar karehu milai sach vaandteea |8|21|
lines.english: Please, shower Nanak with Your Glance of Grace, that he, the separated one, may merge with You again, O Lord. ||8||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਕਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਘਣੋ ਨਿਤ ਸਹਸਾ ਦੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: janam maran kaa dukh ghano nit sahasaa doee |1|
lines.english: The pain of birth and death is so great, in constant skepticism and duality. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਕਿਉ ਰਹੈ ਕਿਉ ਮੇਲਾ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa kiau rahai kiau melaa hoee |
lines.english: How can coming and going, the cycle of reincarnation be ended? And how can one meet the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਾਧੁ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਭਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur saadh na seviaa har bhagat na bhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who does not serve the Holy True Guru, is not pleased by devotion to the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕਿਆ ਜੀਵਨਾ ਫਿਟੁ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai kiaa jeevanaa fitt dhrig chaturaaee |
lines.english: Without the Name, what is life? Cleverness is detestable and cursed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਦੇਇ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਕੂਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: raam naam dhan raas dee binasai bhram kooraa |2|
lines.english: He gives the wealth and capital of the Lord's Name, and false doubt is destroyed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਵਣੁ ਤਉ ਰਹੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaavan tau rahai paaeeai gur pooraa |
lines.english: Coming and going is ended only when one finds the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਪਰੰਪਰਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aad purakh aparanparaa guramukh har paae |3|
lines.english: The Primal Lord, the Infinite, is obtained by the Gurmukh. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਉ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੈ ਧਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kau mil rahai dhan dhan jas gaae |
lines.english: Joining the humble Saintly beings, let us sing the blessed, blessed Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਟੂਐ ਸਾਂਗੁ ਬਣਾਇਆ ਬਾਜੀ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: nattooai saang banaaeaa baajee sansaaraa |
lines.english: The drama of the world is staged like the show of a buffoon.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਬਾਜੀ ਦੇਖੀਐ ਉਝਰਤ ਨਹੀ ਬਾਰਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: khin pal baajee dekheeai ujharat nahee baaraa |4|
lines.english: For an instant, for a moment, the show is seen, but it disappears in no time at all. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਹਾਰੈ ਸੋ ਜਿਣੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sabh jag haarai so jinai gurasabad veechaaraa |5|
lines.english: The whole world loses; he alone wins, who reflects upon the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਚਉਪੜਿ ਖੇਲਣਾ ਝੂਠੇ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: haumai chauparr khelanaa jhootthe ahankaaraa |
lines.english: The game of chance is played on the board of egotism, with the pieces of falsehood and ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਅੰਧੁਲੈ ਹਥਿ ਟੋਹਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਮਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jiau andhulai hath ttohanee har naam hamaarai |
lines.english: As is the cane in the hand of the blind man, so is the Lord's Name for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਤੂੰ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਤਿਉ ਰਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jiau toon raakheh tiau rahaa har naam adhaaraa |
lines.english: As You keep me, Lord, I live; the Lord's Name is my only Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਟੇਕ ਹੈ ਨਿਸਿ ਦਉਤ ਸਵਾਰੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: raam naam har ttek hai nis daut savaarai |6|
lines.english: The Lord's Name is my Support, night and day and morning. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖ ਮੇਟਿਆ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੁਰਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran dukh mettiaa jap naam muraare |
lines.english: The pain of birth and death is removed, by chanting and meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਿ ਸਖਾਈ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦੁਆਰਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: ant sakhaaee paaeaa jan mukat duaaraa |7|
lines.english: It is my only comfort in the end; the gate of salvation is found by His humble servants. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਪੂਰਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਤਾਰੇ ॥੮॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai pooraa gur taare |8|22|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who does not forget the Naam, is saved by the Perfect Guru. ||8||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 asattapadeea ghar 2 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਤੁ ਬੇਦੁ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਰੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਸੁਰਸਰੀ ਚਰਣ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: saasat bed sinmrit sar teraa surasaree charan samaanee |
lines.english: The Shaastras, the Vedas and the Simritees are contained in the ocean of Your Name; the River Ganges is held in Your Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਖਾ ਤੀਨਿ ਮੂਲੁ ਮਤਿ ਰਾਵੈ ਤੂੰ ਤਾਂ ਸਰਬ ਵਿਡਾਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saakhaa teen mool mat raavai toon taan sarab viddaanee |1|
lines.english: The intellect can understand the world of the three modes, but You, O Primal Lord, are totally astounding. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਜਪੈ ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਬੋਲੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: taa ke charan japai jan naanak bole amrit baanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Servant Nanak meditates on His Feet, and chants the Ambrosial Word of His Bani. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਤੀਸ ਕਰੋੜੀ ਦਾਸ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੇ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਅਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: tetees karorree daas tumaare ridh sidh praan adhaaree |
lines.english: Three hundred thirty million gods are Your servants. You bestow wealth, and the supernatural powers of the Siddhas; You are the Support of the breath of life.
